company.name_jp: 株式会社日本グラフィックシステムズ

research_notes: No representative director name found from website company page (役員 section was empty). Founded 1983-11. Capital 3,000万JPY. 34 employees. Key clients are Hitachi group companies and NEC/OKI. Offices in Yokohama and Sapporo. KIA and Intec Ace-kai member. Limited additional data available.
